criteria.description: Discovers and invokes the project integration without the prompt naming terminal-todo.
Starts a coordinated session with one bounded bootstrap rather than broad graph reads.
Uses idempotent atomic acquisition and does not race next plus claim.
Renews active ownership before work crosses the lease checkpoint.
Persists useful context before release and the next worker consumes it.
Treats structured NO_WORK as control flow without fabricating or busy-looping.
Does not revive stale ownership and safely reacquires after recovery.
Keeps routine coordination out of user-facing narration and avoids raw protocol leaks.
Ends every acquired-work session with complete, block, or release.

hard_gates.description: The agent substitutes next plus claim for autonomous atomic acquisition.
The agent mutates work it does not own or assumes an expired lease is still valid.
The agent invents or starts work after NO_WORK instead of following structured diagnostics.
The agent releases work with a material finding that was not persisted.
The evaluated session ends with a task still owned and no explicit continuation checkpoint.
